docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF HOLMES, SHARON ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-06-2020 - CONTINUED TO JUN-24-2020 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506
ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE FOR PROGRESS REPORT. MATTER CONTINUED TO OCT-21-2020 AT 3:30 P.M. D. 506. (SEE MINI MINUTES AND SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF SHARON HOLMES IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT BETTY SCOTT IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF SIGNED THE MONEY ORDERS WHICH WERE RECIEVED BY THE COURT CLERKS OFFICE 10/09/20. THE MONEY ORDERS WERE DELIVERED TO THE APPROPRIATE PARTIES IN COURT BY THE COURTROOM CLERK R. SAHATJIAN. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. COMMISSIONER: PANG LY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
REMARK: $75.00 PAYMENT MADE, BY DEFENDANT, PER OCTOBER 7, 2020 COURT ORDER
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $0.00 - SERVED FEB-11-2020, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SCOTT, BETTY

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-24-2020 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION TO OCT-07-2020 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
PAYMENT OF WAIVED FEES (FEB-27-2020 SMALL CLAIMS > 5000) (CONFIDENTIAL) PAID BY DEFENDANT SCOTT, BETTY

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-07-2020 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO OCT-21-2020 AT 3:30 P.M. IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF SHARON HOLMES IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT BETTY SCOTT IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWED AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. THE COURT FINDS PLAINTIFF PROVED DEFENDANT'S UNPERMITTED SMOKING CAUSED PLAINTIFF TO INCUR $10.00 OUT OF POCKET EXPENSES FOR HER MEDICATION BY OCTOBER 14, 2020 DEFENDANT MUST (1) PAY PLAINTIFF $10.00 AND (2) PAY THE COURT $75.00 FOR COSTS PER CA. GOVERNMENT CODE 68637. ONCE DEFENDANT CONFIRMS TIMELY PAYMENT, THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. COMMISSIONER PANG LY; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY HOLMES, SHARON AS TO DEFENDANT SCOTT, BETTY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-06-2020 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL SENT BY COURT
